name: www.ktlgroup.com
message: KTL Offshore is a company with a global vision: to extend our footprint internationally and to build upon our ability to be one of the world's premium solution providers for lifting, mooring and subsea rigging equipment and services. As we implement the strategy required to attain our vision, KTL Offshore is changing to become a global company with a significant presence in the major Oil & Gas hubs around the developing markets of the world. We are proud to present a short summary of our world class products and services as well as a brief look at our major facilities located in Sing apore and the U.A.E. Over the next few years KTL Offshore will expand into new geographical territory as well as continue to be at the forefront of the latest technological developments in the lifting industry. We are committed to providing the safest and most economically viable lifting solutions and to supporting our customers inter nationally.
